body_txt: A character with a tongue of surprising, implausible, or downright impossible length. A Justified Trope in certain cases — say, a mutation or non-human anatomy — but in other cases this is left completely unexplained (and usually Played for Laughs ). The lucky person in possession of this tongue frequently has a surprising amount of control over it, and may even use it as a weapon . Characters without this feature may suddenly develop one , often in tandem with a Jaw Drop , when startled, screaming, or confronted with a Head-Turning Beauty .
